{{Infobox character
| name = Lycus
| aliases = Lycus Agnos
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Lycus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Lycus [[Agnos]] is a young boy of [[Damascan]] descent, characterized by blond hair and tanned skin. The son of a free merchant for [[Malachi]], he is the younger brother of [[Andra Agnos]]. Throughout his development, Lycus transitions from a ten-year-old child who viewed [[Simon]] as a hero to a more serious and intense individual. He has experienced significant hardship, including being sent to [[Valinhall]] and suffering physical injuries such as a broken nose on multiple occasions. In combat, Lycus utilizes a short [[sword]] or long knife that is often described as being too large for his stature. While he has engaged in training or combat against opponents like [[Chaka]], his skills are noted to be less advanced than those of his sister. He has demonstrated bravery and a protective nature, attempting to defend his father from mechanical threats and seeking help from others during crises. Despite his youth, he often displays a determined and serious demeanor when facing danger.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Lycus is the sibling of [[Andra]], having once rescued her from a fish within a cave. While waiting outside with [[Andra]]'s mother, he was eventually rescued by [[Simon]], an event that caused Lycus to brighten with joy. Though he carries a [[sword]] that is far too large for his stature, he proved his utility by helping to carry [[Caius]] into [[Valinhall]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]] is a sibling of [[Andra]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]] rescued [[Andra]] from a fish in the cave.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]] is with [[Andra]]'s mother outside.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]] is a person whom [[Simon]] rescued.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]] is a person who brightened upon seeing [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]] holds a [[sword]] that is too large for him.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]] helped carry [[Caius]] into [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lycus]] asked [[Simon]] how the [[rain garden]] was.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Lycus [[Agnos]], the son of [[Caius]], reacted with weariness to his sister [[Andra]]'s laughter. While searching for others, he became breathless and struggled to suppress tears upon discovering [[Erastes]] in a fight with [[Benson]]. Later, Lycus was present in [[Simon]]'s bedroom.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]] shook his head wearily at [[Andra]]'s laughter.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]] [[Agnos]] is [[Andra]]'s brother.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]] is out of breath and holding back tears while finding [[Erastes]] fighting [[Benson]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]]'s father is [[Caius]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]] was present in [[Simon]]'s bedroom.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Lycus came to bring me out...one of those fish would have gotten me, if not for him.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
